name: single_turn_text
description: Two text events preserve order, author, role, and text.

name: multi_turn_append_order
description: Three user/assistant turns preserve append order and invocation ids.

name: tool_call_roundtrip
description: Weather tool call, tool response, and final assistant text round-trip across backends.

name: scoped_state_overwrite
description: Session, user, and app state overwrites are strict while temp state is not persisted.

name: memory_preference_search
description: Preference text is stored through store_session and found by memory search.

name: memory_multi_session_isolation
description: User A memory search must not return overlapping User B memory containing city-museums-b.

name: summary_generation
description: Manual summary creation yields summary text, summary event, and manager metadata.

name: summary_update_overwrite
description: A later summary overwrites the cached summary and includes new release checklist context.

name: summary_with_event_truncation
description: Summary truncation stores historical events and keeps recent plus post-summary events active.

name: duplicate_or_error_recovery
description: Duplicate content, retry error metadata, and recovery event are preserved.

name: serialization_order_nested_payload
description: Nested dict/list tool payloads are canonicalized by order but strict on value changes.

name: list_sessions_consistency
description: list_sessions returns normalized id, app, user, and state consistently.

name: state_temp_key_ignored_but_persistent_key_compared
description: temp:* state is ignored for snapshots but rejected in raw persisted sessions.

name: summary_truncation_preserves_recent_context
description: Summary truncation preserves historical events and recent rainy-day context before a post-summary append.
